name: enforce applies ADR structural conformance to a well-formed decision record
command:
printf '# 0001. choose x
- Status: accepted
## Context
why.
## Decision
chose x. Grounding sources: aws-well-architected.
## Consequences
trade-offs.
' > 0001-x.md
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce.sh --root . --rule g-doc-001
